title: Chapter 6
content:
Chapter 6: Touch me

’I am not stopping this time.’ Denzel thought with a dirty perverted lust hungry expression.

His fingers flexed, gripping the entirety of her left boob, at least as much as his palms could cover and felt it mold against his hand.
